title: api.rs hex_encode is byte-by-byte format
description: api.rs hex_encode() (line 24-26) uses .iter().map(|b| format!("{b:02x}")).collect() which allocates a String per byte then collects them all. For 32-byte SHA-256 hashes (the common case), this allocates 32 tiny Strings. Use a pre-sized String with write_fmt or the 'hex' crate's encode function for a single-allocation implementation. This is called on every authenticated request (token hashing).
